heading: Styled 404 page
description: A custom 404 page has been implemented to enhance user experience when they navigate to a non-existent page on the site.

heading: Confirmed delete account functionality
description: Users are able to delete their accounts.

heading: Fixed chat ended status issue
description: Resolved issue where if a chat has ended, it will disable the textarea and not only the 'end chat' button.

heading: Fixed conversation deletion issue
description: Resolved issue where if both users close a conversation with each other, the conversation doesn't get deleted. Now, if all participants of a conversation have hidden it, the conversation history will be deleted from the database.

heading: Added contact form functionality
description: The contact form on the website is now functional, allowing users to send messages directly to the support team. This will enable users to easily reach out for assistance, report issues, or provide feedback, improving overall communication and support for the platform.

heading: Added in-browser notifications for new messages and ad replies
description: Users will now receive in-browser notifications for new messages and ad replies, ensuring they stay informed about incoming communications even when they are not actively viewing the inbox. This feature enhances user engagement and responsiveness by providing timely alerts for important interactions on the platform.

heading: Added confirmation prompt before account deletion and ad deletion
description: Before a user deletes their account or a role-play ad, they will receive a confirmation prompt to ensure that they do not accidentally delete important information. This will help prevent unintended deletions and provide users with an opportunity to reconsider their actions before permanently removing their account or ad.

heading: Favoriting ads functionality
description: Users are now able to favorite role-play ads, allowing them to easily find and revisit their preferred ads later. This feature enhances user experience by providing a convenient way to keep track of ads they are interested in and access them quickly from their profile or a dedicated favorites section.

heading: Added 'unlike' functionality for ads on favorited ads page
description: Users can now unlike ads directly from the favorited ads page, allowing them to manage their list of favorited ads more efficiently. This feature provides users with greater control over their favorites and helps them keep their list of preferred ads up to date without having to navigate back to the ad itself.

heading: Added character limit to text message
description: To prevent excessively long messages that may cause performance issues or hinder readability, a character limit of 2000 characters has been implemented for messages sent within the platform. This ensures that messages remain concise and easy to read, while also improving overall performance and user experience by reducing the likelihood of encountering issues related to long messages.
